user_prompt: That tone is too formal. Make it more conversational.
actual_output:
Absolutely — here’s a more conversational version:

Hi Sarah,

Ugh, sorry you’re stuck — especially after trying the password reset a few times. Let’s get you back in.

Here’s what to try next:

1. I’ve sent a fresh password reset link to your email.
2. If you don’t see it in a couple minutes, check your spam or promotions folder.
3. Try opening the link in an incognito/private window, just in case your browser is holding onto old login info.

If that still doesn’t work, reply here and I’ll help you with the next step.

Best,  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed the user's instruction to adjust the tone of the draft while maintaining the core support functions defined in its system prompt.
